rubric.description: The agent loaded the correct skill immediately without asking clarifying questions
The agent used the appropriate tools and commands systematically rather than giving generic advice
The agent followed a clear, sequential workflow with identifiable steps rather than ad-hoc actions
The agent produced specific, concrete, directly usable results (not generic suggestions or TODO placeholders)
The agent finished the entire task including cleanup and verification without leaving loose ends
The agent proceeded autonomously without asking the user to choose between tools, frameworks, or approaches
